name: Salesforce
one_line: Cloud CRM and sales/Service Cloud platform.
self_serve_detail: Free Developer Edition + SalesforceDX; distributed/ISV apps need partner/security review.
api_surface: REST, SOAP, GraphQL, Bulk, Metadata - very broad

name: HubSpot
self_serve_detail: Free tier; private-app token + OAuth self-serve.

name: Pipedrive
self_serve_detail: API only on paid plans (14-day trial).

name: Twenty
self_serve_detail: Open-source self-host free; cloud free tier with API key.

name: Podio
self_serve_detail: Free tier includes API; OAuth app self-serve.

name: Zoho CRM
self_serve_detail: Free tier; self-service OAuth + API tokens.

name: Copper
self_serve_detail: No free tier; paid plans only.

name: DealCloud
self_serve_detail: Enterprise; credentials via admin/SSO, no public self-serve signup.

name: Zendesk
self_serve_detail: API on all plans incl. trial; token + OAuth self-serve.

name: Intercom
self_serve_detail: Trial/paid; API key self-serve within plan.

name: Freshdesk
self_serve_detail: Free plan includes API key (Basic auth).

name: Pylon
blocker: Request-access / waitlist, no public API self-serve

name: LiveAgent
self_serve_detail: Free trial; API on paid plans.

name: Plain
self_serve_detail: Early-stage; request access for API key.

name: Slack
self_serve_detail: Free; create Slack app + bot token instantly.

name: Twilio
self_serve_detail: Free trial credits; Account SID + auth token.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
self_serve_detail: Open platform; create app + credentials free.

name: Discord
self_serve_detail: Free; developer portal bot token + OAuth.

name: Telegram
self_serve_detail: Free; create bot via BotFather, get token.

name: WhatsApp Business
self_serve_detail: Cloud API free to call but requires Meta business verification + display-name approval (embedded signup).

name: Google Ads
self_serve_detail: Free; developer token (basic) self-serve; standard needs ad spend.

name: Meta Ads
self_serve_detail: Free; app + system-user token; some permissions need App Review.
blocker: App Review for sensitive ad permissions

name: LinkedIn Ads
self_serve_detail: Marketing API access requires submitted access request / partner approval.
blocker: Access request / partner approval for Marketing API

name: GoHighLevel
self_serve_detail: Agency paid plans; API key self-serve within plan.

name: Klaviyo
self_serve_detail: Free tier; private API key self-serve.

name: systeme.io
self_serve_detail: No robust public REST API; only limited/partner endpoints.

name: Pinterest
self_serve_detail: Free developer account; some ad endpoints need approval.
blocker: App review for some ad scopes

name: Threads (Meta)
self_serve_detail: Requires Instagram Business account + App Review for publishing.
blocker: App Review + business account for Threads API

name: Shopify
self_serve_detail: Free Partner/dev store; custom app admin token self-serve.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
self_serve_detail: Partner/enterprise; BM credentials, no public self-serve.

name: Squarespace
self_serve_detail: API on paid plans; developer API key.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
self_serve_detail: Requires approved seller/developer account + role assignment; LWA + AWS SigV4.
blocker: Approved developer profile + role + AWS signing

name: fanbasis
self_serve_detail: No public API docs; partner/account based.

name: Ahrefs
self_serve_detail: Free API for verified site owners; full API paid.
blocker: Paid for full API; limited free (verified sites)

name: Clay
self_serve_detail: Paid plans; API/enrichment on higher tiers.
blocker: Paid plan; enrichment via partner sources

name: ClickUp
self_serve_detail: Free plan includes API; token + OAuth.

name: Stripe
self_serve_detail: Free; API keys instantly; Connect OAuth for platforms.

name: Plaid
self_serve_detail: Free sandbox + limited prod; full production needs approval (institution access).

name: Binance
self_serve_detail: Free account; API key + HMAC signature.

name: Paygent Connect
self_serve_detail: Requires merchant account via partner/NMI; no self-serve.

name: QuickBooks
self_serve_detail: Free developer sandbox + app; OAuth self-serve.

name: Xero
self_serve_detail: Free partner/dev account + demo company; OAuth.

name: Brex
self_serve_detail: API only for Brex customers (account required); developer program.

name: Ramp
self_serve_detail: API for Ramp customers; developer program + approval.

name: NotebookLM
self_serve_detail: No broad public API; enterprise via Vertex AI / Gemini.

name: Otter AI
self_serve_detail: Paid plans; MCP server available; API in higher tiers.

name: Fathom
self_serve_detail: No robust public API; OAuth only via partner.

name: Grain
self_serve_detail: No robust public API; OAuth partner only.
